phrases.intent_en: Ask for a ticket to visit the studio
phrases.text_local: Je voudrais un billet pour visiter l'atelier, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh voo-DREH uhn bee-YEH poor vee-zee-TAY lah-tuh-LYAY, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: Cézanne's studio (Atelier des Lauves) has been preserved exactly as he left it in 1906. His objects — skull, ginger pot, wine bottle — are still arranged on the shelves and appear in his later still-life paintings.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photos are allowed in the studio
phrases.text_local: Peut-on prendre des photos dans l'atelier ?
phrases.pronunciation: puh-TOHN PRAHN-druh day foh-TOH dahn lah-tuh-LYAY
phrases.cultural_note: Cézanne's studio has been preserved exactly as he left it in 1906. Photography rules may vary.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to see Cézanne's paintings in Aix
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on voir les œuvres de Cézanne à Aix ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TOHN vwahr layz UH-vruh duh say-ZAN ah EKS
phrases.cultural_note: The Musée Granet holds an important Cézanne collection. The tourist office also offers a Cézanne trail map linking all the sites in Aix connected to his life, including his birthplace on Rue de l'Opéra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a guided tour
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une visite guidée en anglais ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL oon vee-ZEET ghee-DAY ahn ahn-GLEH
phrases.cultural_note: Guided tours in English are available and highly recommended — the guide brings the studio alive with stories of Cézanne's daily routines and his obsessive study of the Sainte-Victoire mountain visible from the garden.

responses.english: Yes, the next one is at 2 PM.
responses.phonetic: wee, lah proh-SHEHN eh ah kah-TORZ UHR
responses.french: Oui, la prochaine est à quatorze heures.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a gift shop
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une boutique de souvenirs ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL oon boo-TEEK duh soov-NEER
phrases.cultural_note: The studio shop offers Cézanne reproductions, books, and Aix-themed gifts.
